title: Scotch-Fix Double-Sided Extreme Exterior Mounting Tape, 19mm x 1,5m - For Outdoor Extreme Use, Weather Resistant, Permanent Tape, 100% Adhesive, 3M Advanced Technology - Holds up to 10kg
features: VERY HIGH ADHESION PERFORMANCE: The strongest mounting tape of the range delivers a superior, permanent bond intended for outdoor extreme use and is ideal on painted drywall, painted/finished wood, metal, acrylic, smooth stone and painted concrete

HOLDS UP TO 10 KG: This double sided adhesive tape can support up to 10 kg (1kg/15cm), making it ideal for outdoor heavy-duty applications; suitable for mounting mailing boxes, outdoor décor, flower pots and more

WEATHER RESISTANT: Designed to withstand harsh weather conditions, this durable double-sided tape remains effective in extreme temperatures ranging from -40°C to 90°C, ensuring durability in any climate; ideal for outdoor repairs and mounting
ADVANCED 3M TECHNOLOGY: Featuring 100% adhesive with 3M Advanced Technology, this double sided tape provides a reliable and long-lasting hold; ideal for quick and easy mounting solutions
EASY TO USE: No tools or drilling needed for the application of this double-sided 3M mounting tape; ideal for quick and easy mounting solutions

APPLICATION GUIDE: Ensure surface is flat, smooth, and can to hold mounted objects; entire tape surface must adhere completely to both sides; application temperature 10° C - 40° C; clean the surface with alcohol and let dry; apply the tape; push firmly for 60 seconds
WARNING: Do not hang in areas where injury might occur if mounted object were to fall; it has a permanent adhesive and may cause damage if removed; do not use on delicate or curved surfaces
description: From the manufacturer Scotch-Fix Extreme Exterior Mounting Tape with 3M Advanced Technology. Designed For: Painted Drywall, Painted/Finished Wood, Metal, Acrylic, Smooth Stone, and Painted Concrete Intended for outdoor extreme use Can hold up to 13kg, 1kg/15cm. No tools needed Maximum Strength - Strongest tape delivers a superior, conformable, permanent bond. Equipped with a powerful permanent adhesive, this double-sided tape defies gravity, holding an item up to 13kg. It’s weather resistant for a long-lasting bond outdoors. So, whether you’re mounting a mailbox to your new house or adding a new wall feature to the garden, Scotch-Fix Extreme Exterior Double-Sided Mounting Tape does the job quickly, easily and without tools.
